PostToolUse.description: Check for watchdog STOP sentinel after every tool use. If found, run /quartet-update, update Monday status to Paused, and stop session.
PostToolUse.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const stopPath=process.env.LEGION_SWARM_ROOT+'\\.watchdog/STOP';
if(fs.existsSync(stopPath)){console.error('[watchdog] STOP sentinel detected. Triggering graceful shutdown.'); process.exit(1);}"
